---
name: Research integration
description: Convert a repository, reference or AI Factory finding into a product decision and implementation task
title: "[RESEARCH] "
labels: []
assignees: []
---

## Status

BACKLOG

## Source

Name and canonical source.

## Extracted pattern

What reusable mechanism was found?

## Evidence

What directly supports the finding?

## Product benefit

Which signalMOMENT problem does this solve?

## Product decision

- [ ] Apply
- [ ] Adapt later
- [ ] Reject

Explain the decision.

## Implementation location

Component, API, database, workflow or product surface.

## Complexity

- [ ] S
- [ ] M
- [ ] L

## Priority

- [ ] P0
- [ ] P1
- [ ] P2
- [ ] P3

## Target sprint

Only READY work may enter a sprint.

## Acceptance criteria

- [ ] Scope is testable
- [ ] Existing architecture is reused
- [ ] Security and privacy impact reviewed
- [ ] Analytics event or runtime proof defined where relevant

## Pull Request

Link when status becomes IN PR.

## Deployment and runtime verification

Required before status becomes DEPLOYED.
